personalInfo.name: Hrishabh Tripathi
personalInfo.title: Data Engineer | ETL/ELT Developer | Cloud Specialist
personalInfo.summary: Experienced Data Engineer with 3+ years of expertise in designing, implementing, and managing data solutions on Azure and AWS platforms. Skilled in ETL processes, data modeling, and creating scalable data workflows for business insights.

description: Implemented Azure Data Factory for ETL processes, orchestrating data workflows across Azure services and on-premises sources
Achieved an overall 25% improvement in system performance and operational efficiency by optimizing data workflows
Managed Azure Cloud Services for infrastructure, provisioning virtual machines, storage accounts, and networking components
Integrated Azure Databricks into data workflows to enable high-performance data processing and analytics
Utilized Tidal and Control-M for job scheduling and SQL for data analysis, ensuring timely data loading
Automated recurring file validation and transformation tasks using VBA, Power Query, and PowerShell

projects.title: Azure Data Factory for Data Engineers - Covid19 project
projects.description: Built and managed automated data pipelines using Azure Data Factory (ADF) to ingest, transform, and load COVID-19 data from external APIs and Azure Blob Storage into Azure Data Lake Gen2 and Azure SQL Database.

certificates.name: AWS Certified Data Engineer - Associate
certificates.file: AWS Certified Data Engineer - Associate certificate.pdf

certificates.name: Microsoft Power BI Data Analyst Associate (PL-300)

achievements.title: FY24 Q4 Champs Award
achievements.description: Received from DXC Technology Pvt Ltd for being one of the top performers
